name: musasabi-os
description: Musasabi OS monorepo - Epic β-001: Sales Department Operational Release

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@musasabi/shared --workspace=@musasabi/avatar-2d --workspace=@musasabi/ai-core --workspace=@musasabi/integrations --workspace=@musasabi/voice-analysis --workspace=@musasabi/voice-engine --if-present && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
